user.title: Bosch Smart Home Camera — Login (Step 1 of 2)
user.description:
**How to log in:**

1. Copy the URL from the field below
2. Open it in your browser (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, ...)
3. Log in with your **Bosch SingleKey ID** (the same account you use for the Bosch Smart Home Camera app)
4. After login, the browser shows a **404 error page** — this is completely normal and expected
5. Copy the **full URL** from the browser address bar — it starts with `https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=`
6. Come back here and click **Submit** to continue to Step 2

data.login_url: Bosch Login URL — copy this and open in your browser

auth.title: Bosch Smart Home Camera — Paste URL (Step 2 of 2)
auth.description:
**Paste the redirect URL from your browser:**

After logging in, your browser shows a 404 page. The URL in the address bar looks like:

`https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=eyJ...long code...`

Copy that **full URL** from the address bar and paste it into the field below.

**Important:** The code expires after ~60 seconds — paste it quickly after logging in.

data.redirect_url: Redirect URL (paste the full URL from the browser address bar)

error.invalid_redirect_url: No auth code found in the URL. Make sure you paste the full URL from the browser address bar — it must start with https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=...
error.token_exchange_failed: Login failed. The auth code may have expired (it is only valid for ~60 seconds). Please go back, copy the login URL again, log in fresh, and paste the new redirect URL immediately.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Bosch servers. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.timeout: Connection timed out. Check your internet and try again.

abort.already_configured: Bosch Smart Home Camera is already configured.

init.title: Bosch Camera — Options
init.description:
**Token status:** {token_status}

The integration automatically renews the token in the background using the saved refresh token — no manual action needed.

data.enable_snapshots: Enable camera snapshot entities (latest motion JPEG)
data.enable_sensors: Enable sensors (Status / Last Event / Events Today)
data.enable_snapshot_button: Enable buttons (Refresh Snapshot / Open Live Stream)
data.enable_auto_download: Auto-download all event files (JPEG + MP4) in background
data.force_relogin: Force new browser login (only needed if refresh token expired)

relogin_show.title: Re-login — Step 1 of 2
relogin_show.description:
**How to re-authenticate:**

1. Copy the URL from the field below
2. Open it in your browser
3. Log in with your **Bosch SingleKey ID**
4. The browser shows a **404 page** — this is expected
5. Copy the **full URL** from the browser address bar
6. Click **Submit** to continue

data.login_url: Bosch Login URL — copy this and open in your browser

relogin_paste.title: Re-login — Step 2 of 2
relogin_paste.description:
**Paste the redirect URL from your browser:**

After the 404 page, copy the full URL from the browser address bar (starts with `https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=...`) and paste it below.

**Important:** The code expires after ~60 seconds — paste it quickly.

data.redirect_url: Redirect URL (paste the full URL from the browser address bar)

error.invalid_redirect_url: No auth code found. Paste the full URL from the browser address bar (starts with https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=...).
error.token_exchange_failed: Login failed — the auth code may have expired (valid ~60 seconds). Go back and try again immediately after logging in.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Bosch servers. Check your internet connection.

trigger_snapshot.name: Trigger Snapshot Refresh
trigger_snapshot.description: Force an immediate snapshot refresh for all Bosch cameras.

open_live_connection.name: Open Live Connection
open_live_connection.description: Open a live stream proxy connection for a Bosch camera (H.264 30fps + AAC audio).

camera_id.name: Camera ID
camera_id.description: Cloud UUID of the camera (find it in the camera entity attributes)
